Description: "Register the 'retroarcade' template in GreetingCard model templates array."
Instruction: "Add the retroarcade option in the templates array in GreetingCard.php"
ReplacementContent:
"    // Template labels
    public static array $templates = [
        'stillwithyou' => 'Still With You 💗',
        'giftforanita'  => 'Gift For Anita 🎁',
        'oceanbreeze'   => 'Ocean Breeze 🌊',
        'cosmicdrift'   => 'Cosmic Drift 🌌',
        'retroarcade'   => 'Retro Arcade 👾',
    ];"
